task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the email client's folder pane (usually on the left side). Verify there is a folder explicitly named 'Threat-Financial'.
Look at the email client's folder pane. Verify there is a folder explicitly named 'Threat-Commercial'.

task_completion.description: Move at least five financial fraud emails into the 'Threat-Financial' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Threat-Financial' folder or an indicator showing the number of emails inside it. There must be at least 5 emails. The visible subject lines or snippets should relate to financial fraud (e.g., containing keywords like bank, account, transfer, lottery, inheritance, urgent).

task_completion.description: Move at least five commercial spam emails into the 'Threat-Commercial' folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the 'Threat-Commercial' folder or an indicator showing the number of emails inside it. There must be at least 5 emails. The visible subject lines or snippets should relate to commercial spam (e.g., containing keywords like software, pharmacy, discount, newsletter, offer).

task_completion.description: Draft an email to intel-team@security-corp.com with the subject 'Weekly Fraud Report'
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an open email composition window. The 'To' field must contain 'intel-team@security-corp.com' and the 'Subject' field must contain 'Weekly Fraud Report'.

task_completion.description: Include the subject lines of the identified financial fraud emails in the draft body
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the body of the drafted email. It must contain a list of text strings that correspond to the subject lines of the financial fraud emails previously sorted into the 'Threat-Financial' folder.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical email client to perform the sorting and drafting
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the actions (folder creation, email moving, drafting) are performed within a GUI email application (like Thunderbird or Evolution) rather than using terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The report is drafted in the email client's composer, not a separate text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the draft email is located in the email client's actual message composition window, not in a text editor like Gedit or Nano.

integrity.description: The emails moved appear to be genuine spam from the Junk folder
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the emails in the Threat folders have realistic sender addresses, dates, and subject lines typical of the SpamAssassin corpus, rather than looking like manually typed dummy emails.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create 'Threat-Financial' and 'Threat-Commercial' folders and move at least 5 matching emails into each. Financial emails typically contain keywords like: fund, transfer, bank, account, inheritance, lottery, winner, million, dollar, urgent, confidential, kin, business proposal, transaction, beneficiary, atm, payment, wire. Commercial emails typically contain keywords like: pill, viagra, cialis, medication, pharmacy, drug, replica, watch, rolex, software, dvd, adobe, microsoft, offer, discount, click, unsubscribe, marketing, newsletter, deal. The draft email must be addressed to 'intel-team@security-corp.com' with the subject 'Weekly Fraud Report' and contain the financial email subject lines in the body.
